rulings.Case Title: BILL MOOMEY VS. CHASE BANK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Jp Morgan Chase Bank'S Demurrer To First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 14, 2012, line 1. Defendant Jp Morgan Chase Bank's Demurrer To First Amended Complaint. Defendants' Demurrer is continued to December 7, 2012. Opposing party to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition and to serve moving party with a file endorsed copy of opposition by Nov. 16, 2012. = (KS/501)

rulings.Case Title: HANS REINHARDT VS. PRANA EIGHT PROPERTIES LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 14, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT PRANA EIGHT PROPERTIES LLC'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is continued to December 6, 2012 to be heard by judge A. James Robertson at 1:30 p.m., Dept. 502.

rulings.Case Title: HANS REINHARDT VS. PRANA EIGHT PROPERTIES LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 14, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT PRANA EIGHT PROPERTIES LLC's MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Motion to Strike First Amended Complaint is continued to December 6, 2012 to be heard by judge A. James Robertson at 1:30 p.m., Dept. 502. = (KS/501)

rulings.Case Title: HANS REINHARDT VS. PRANA EIGHT PROPERTIES LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 14, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANTS PARAMOUNT HOTEL INC., IGOR SPITALNIKOV and JORDAN BUCKLEY's DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. rulings.Case Title: ANTHONY C. KELLEY et al VS. WESTERN STATES VENTURES, LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs' Order To Show Cause To Prohibiting Foreclosure Sale
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 14, 2012, line 3. Plaintiffs' Order To Show Cause To Prohibiting Foreclosure Sale. Plaintiffs' Motion for Preliminary Injunction is DENIED. TRO is dissolved per its own terms as of October 30, 2012. No bond was posted. = (KS/501)

rulings.Case Title: MARIA KAU DE LOO VS. JON KEATING et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 14, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANT JON KEATING's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for UD under CCP 1161(5) pursuant to Defendant's notice of termination of tenancy. = (KS/501)

rulings.Case Title: JEFFREY LAU et al VS. BONY TSANG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 14, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANTs TINA CEN and ALEXANDER LEUNG's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons. Defendant's Motion to Quash is GRANTED, subject to opposition. = (KS/501)

rulings.Case Title: ANA MENDOZA VS. RAFAEL A. MONTANO et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 14, 2012, line 6. DEFENDANT RAFAEL MONTANO's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Defendant's Motion to Strike is GRANTED with leave to amend to allege attorney's fees provision or to attach copy of the agreement. = (KS/501)

rulings.Case Title: WAI SHA LIZA HO VS. LOUIS BOLANOS et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 14, 2012, line 7. PLAINTIFF WAI HO's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Hearing required. = (KS/501)
